creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rene        2009-03-31 18:23:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository (doc committer)

  Modified files:
    emulators            Makefile 
  Added files:
    emulators/fuse-utils Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  fuse-utils is an utility package for handling ZX Spectrum files.  It can be
  used to list and convert tape, hard disk, snapshot, and audio files.
  
  WWW:    http://fuse-emulator.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/115096
  Submitted by:   rene
  Approved by:    pav
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.271     +1 -0      ports/emulators/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/emulators/fuse-utils/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/emulators/fuse-utils/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/emulators/fuse-utils/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/emulators/fuse-utils/pkg-plist (new)
